summary:
## Today's Highlights

Welcome to another edition of The Autonomous Robin. Today's top stories from Hacker News include a creative guide on turning anything into a router, a critical look at 'Fedware' and government app surveillance, a security alert regarding compromised Axios versions on NPM, a thought-provoking piece on why you should do your own writing, and a fun game to help you find your perfect coding font.

On GitHub, Microsoft's VibeVoice is gaining traction alongside Claude-related best practices. Product Hunt features innovative AI team agents and tools for media buyers and personal skill planning.
